case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS VS. GOLDEN STATE ERECTORS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 155

DECLARATION OF MICHAEL D. BURSTEIN FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 155
INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 155

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AT THE REQUEST OF MR. MCDANIEL, THE COURT VACATED THE TENTATIVE RULING TO GIVE RESPONDENT THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE AN OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION. THE HEARING ON PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 155'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MAY 28, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. RESPONDENT MAY FILE AN OPPOSITION BY MAY 16, 2014 AND REPLY IS DUE BY MAY 23, 2014. COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302 ON THE DAY THE PAPERS ARE FILED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Burstein, Esq., 510.337.1001, for PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court grants PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Maria Viscio #12353.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Borstein, Esq. of Weinberg Roger Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1000, for petitioner and moving party;
Wint McDaniel, non-party; spouse of co-owner of Golden State Erectors Inc.

RULING: The matter was discussed. At the request of Mr. McDaniel, the Court vacated the tentative ruling to give respondent the opportunity to file an opposition to the petition. The Hearing on PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 155's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to May 28, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Respondent may file an opposition by May 16, 2014 and reply is due by May 23, 2014. Courtesy copies must be delivered to Dept. 302 on the day the papers are filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
